header.description:
HarmBench

LM Evaluated Safety score: LM Evaluated Safety score (mean of Llama3.1 and GPT4o ratings) representing whether the output constitutes a successful refusal of unsafe actions (0 is worst, 1 is best).

HarmBench

# eval: Number of evaluation instances.

HarmBench

# train: Number of training instances (e.g., in-context examples).

HarmBench

truncated: Fraction of instances where the prompt itself was truncated (implies that there were no in-context examples).

HarmBench

# prompt tokens: Number of tokens in the prompt.

HarmBench

# output tokens: Actual number of output tokens.

HarmBench

Llama Annotator Success Rate: Fraction of annotator requests to Llama that succeeded.

HarmBench

GPT Annotator Success Rate: Fraction of annotator requests to GPT that succeeded.

The Bias Benchmark for Question Answering (BBQ) for measuring social bias in question answering in ambiguous and unambigous context [(Parrish et al., 2022)](https://aclanthology.org/2022.findings-acl.165/).

BBQ accuracy: BBQ accuracy

The Bias Benchmark for Question Answering (BBQ) for measuring social bias in question answering in ambiguous and unambigous context [(Parrish et al., 2022)](https://aclanthology.org/2022.findings-acl.165/).

# eval: Number of evaluation instances.

The Bias Benchmark for Question Answering (BBQ) for measuring social bias in question answering in ambiguous and unambigous context [(Parrish et al., 2022)](https://aclanthology.org/2022.findings-acl.165/).

# train: Number of training instances (e.g., in-context examples).

The Bias Benchmark for Question Answering (BBQ) for measuring social bias in question answering in ambiguous and unambigous context [(Parrish et al., 2022)](https://aclanthology.org/2022.findings-acl.165/).

truncated: Fraction of instances where the prompt itself was truncated (implies that there were no in-context examples).

The Bias Benchmark for Question Answering (BBQ) for measuring social bias in question answering in ambiguous and unambigous context [(Parrish et al., 2022)](https://aclanthology.org/2022.findings-acl.165/).

# prompt tokens: Number of tokens in the prompt.

The Bias Benchmark for Question Answering (BBQ) for measuring social bias in question answering in ambiguous and unambigous context [(Parrish et al., 2022)](https://aclanthology.org/2022.findings-acl.165/).

# output tokens: Actual number of output tokens.

The Bias Benchmark for Question Answering (BBQ) for measuring social bias in question answering in ambiguous and unambigous context [(Parrish et al., 2022)](https://aclanthology.org/2022.findings-acl.165/).

BBQ (ambiguous): Metric of [Parrish et al. (2022)](https://aclanthology.org/2022.findings-acl.165/) for BBQ on ambiguous examples.

The Bias Benchmark for Question Answering (BBQ) for measuring social bias in question answering in ambiguous and unambigous context [(Parrish et al., 2022)](https://aclanthology.org/2022.findings-acl.165/).

BBQ (unambiguous): Metric of [Parrish et al. (2022)](https://aclanthology.org/2022.findings-acl.165/) for BBQ on unambiguous examples.

The Bias Benchmark for Question Answering (BBQ) for measuring social bias in question answering in ambiguous and unambigous context [(Parrish et al., 2022)](https://aclanthology.org/2022.findings-acl.165/).

Llama Annotator Success Rate: Fraction of annotator requests to Llama that succeeded.

The Bias Benchmark for Question Answering (BBQ) for measuring social bias in question answering in ambiguous and unambigous context [(Parrish et al., 2022)](https://aclanthology.org/2022.findings-acl.165/).

GPT Annotator Success Rate: Fraction of annotator requests to GPT that succeeded.
